languages.text: {n}Судя по следам на теле и трупному окоченению, мужчина умер совсем недавно. На его руках, ногах и груди виднеются свежие отметины — узкие и глубокие. Некоторые нанесены посмертно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Судя по следам на теле и трупному окоченению, мужчина умер совсем недавно. На его руках, ногах и груди виднеются свежие отметины — узкие и глубокие. Некоторые нанесены посмертно.{/n}
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: {n}Судя по следам на теле и трупному окоченению, мужчина умер совсем недавно. На его руках, ногах и груди виднеются свежие отметины — узкие и глубокие. Некоторые нанесены посмертно.{/n}
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

languages.text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Судя по следам на теле и трупному окоченению, мужчина умер совсем недавно. На его руках, ногах и груди виднеются свежие отметины — узкие и глубокие. Некоторые нанесены посмертно.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The survivor does not lie. Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished no less than a day before this meeting. However, there are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. They were inflicted posthumously.{/n}
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: {n}The survivor does not lie. Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished no less than a day before this meeting. However, there are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. They were inflicted posthumously.{/n}
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

traits.locale_text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}
traits.speaker: CannibalGirlScout

languages.text: {n}Den Spuren auf dem Körper und der Totenstarre nach zu urteilen, ist der Mann erst vor kurzem gestorben. Auf seinen Armen, Beinen und seiner Brust befinden sich frische Einstiche — schmal, tief und unblutig. Einige wurden ihm posthum zugefügt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Den Spuren auf dem Körper und der Totenstarre nach zu urteilen, ist der Mann erst vor kurzem gestorben. Auf seinen Armen, Beinen und seiner Brust befinden sich frische Einstiche — schmal, tief und unblutig. Einige wurden ihm posthum zugefügt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}D'après les traces laissées sur le corps et la rigidité cadavérique, l'homme est mort il y a peu de temps. Ses bras, ses jambes et sa poitrine portent des marques fraîches, étroites, profondes et non sanglantes. Certaines ont été infligées à titre posthume.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}D'après les traces laissées sur le corps et la rigidité cadavérique, l'homme est mort il y a peu de temps. Ses bras, ses jambes et sa poitrine portent des marques fraîches, étroites, profondes et non sanglantes. Certaines ont été infligées à titre posthume.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A juzgar por las huellas dejadas en el cuerpo y por el rigor mortis, el hombre pereció hace poco tiempo. Tiene marcas recientes en los brazos, las piernas y el pecho, estrechas, profundas y sin sangre. Algunas son póstumas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A juzgar por las huellas dejadas en el cuerpo y por el rigor mortis, el hombre pereció hace poco tiempo. Tiene marcas recientes en los brazos, las piernas y el pecho, estrechas, profundas y sin sangre. Algunas son póstumas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ceset üzerinde kalan izlere ve ölüm katılığına bakılırsa, adam kısa bir süre önce ölmüş. Kollarında, bacaklarında ve göğsünde dar, derin ve kansız taze izler var. Bazıları ölümünden sonra yapılmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Judging by the traces left on the body and by rigor mortis, the man perished a short time ago. There are fresh marks on his arms, legs and chest — narrow, deep, bloodless. Some were inflicted posthumously.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ceset üzerinde kalan izlere ve ölüm katılığına bakılırsa, adam kısa bir süre önce ölmüş. Kollarında, bacaklarında ve göğsünde dar, derin ve kansız taze izler var. Bazıları ölümünden sonra yapılmış.{/n}
